query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: A tall palm tree stands in silhouette at the center of the frame against a pale, foggy sky, with a diffused red sun visible near the horizon behind its trunk. Dark foliage from another tree appears along the right edge, and the scene is surrounded by a soft, dark oval border.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tall palm tree stands in silhouette against a washed-out, desaturated sky that has faded to dull gray, conveying melancholy and exhaustion. A diffused red sun glows weakly through the fog behind the trunk, but the scene is suffocated by oppressive low contrast and crushed midtones that weaken the separation between the dark tree and the pale background. The hazy atmosphere evokes a sense of depression and unease, while dark foliage along the right edge remains trapped in the same muted, distressing haze.
